Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze the Request Goal Create two POWL Partially Ordered Workflow Language models based on a provided textual description of a hiring process at GlobalTeq Solutions Context The process involves resume submission data checks loop skill assessment cultural fit affiliation check potential bias point and final decision Model 1 Unfair Must include the XOR branching where one path involves CommunityAffiliationCheck giving a subtle advantage Model 2 Fair Must remove the special community based branch All applicants go through the same CulturalFitCheck Format Python code using pm4py objects powl obj classes StrictPartialOrder OperatorPOWL Transition SilentTransition and pm4py objects process tree obj Operator Key Activities ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision Structure Need to represent Loops Choices XOR and Partial Orders PO

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Process Flow Start Receive Application Loop Check Data Completeness If missing Request More Info Check again If complete Proceed Next Skill Assessment Branching Point The Difference Unfair Model XOR between CulturalFitCheck standard and CommunityAffiliationCheck biased path Fair Model Just CulturalFitCheck for everyone no XOR Next Managerial Review End Final Decision

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review against Constraints Constraint POWL models are defined in pm4py objects powl obj Constraint StrictPartialOrder nodes must be provided in the constructor Constraint OperatorPOWL children must be provided in the constructor Constraint Ensure that your first model demonstrates where unfairness could appear XOR with CommunityAffiliationCheck Constraint Ensure that your second model removes that potential source of bias No XOR just CulturalFitCheck Constraint Use specific labels ReceiveApplication DataCompletenessCheck RequestMoreInfo SkillAssessment CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck ManagerialReview FinalDecision

Name: Backtracking - PE
